description: Phase B-5 chaos drill: simulate network partition during external API calls. Verifies the error classifier correctly tags ECONNREFUSED / ENOTFOUND and the pipeline retries or aborts as configured.
expected_outcome: Network errors are classified as 'network' or 'timeout' with the network.dns / network.refused rule. Pipeline status is 'failed' (not 'crashed').

params.cmd: echo 'chaos drill: network-partition — pointing requests at unreachable host'
